scripts.clean:cache: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const dirs=['node_modules/.cache/turbo','packages/admin/.next','packages/admin/.turbo','packages/cli/.turbo','packages/cli/dist','packages/core/.turbo','packages/core/dist','packages/database/.turbo','packages/database/dist','packages/design-system/.turbo','packages/hooks/.turbo','packages/types/.turbo','packages/types/dist','packages/utils/.turbo','packages/backends/express/.turbo','packages/backends/express/dist','create-enterprise-app/.turbo','create-enterprise-app/dist']; dirs.forEach(d=>{const p=path.join(root,d); try{fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true}); console.log('Removed:',d);}catch(e){}})"
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run clean:cache && turbo run build --force
